ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the property */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Base rent for the property */,
  "house_1" INTEGER /* Rent for the property with 1 house */,
  "house_2" INTEGER /* Rent for the property with 2 houses */,
  "house_3" INTEGER /* Rent for the property with 3 houses */,
  "house_4" INTEGER /* Rent for the property with 4 houses */,
  "hotel" INTEGER /* Rent for the property with a hotel */,
  "deed_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the property deed */,
  "house_cost" INTEGER /* Cost to build a house on the property */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the property group */,
  "tile" INTEGER /* Tile number of the property on the board */,
  "rent_multiplier" REAL /* Rent multiplier based on the number of houses and hotels */,
  "mortgage_value" INTEGER /* Mortgage value of the property */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability of the property for purchase or rent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES property_groups ("color")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property group */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the property group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the property group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or player who owns the property */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the property was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" INTEGER /* Purchase price of the property */,
  "is_mortgaged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is mortgaged */,
  "mortgage_status" TEXT /* Mortgage status of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ownership_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, financial analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale, rent) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_improvements" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being improved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or player making the improvement */,
  "improvement_type" TEXT /* Type of improvement (e.g., house, hotel) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the improvement */,
  "improvement_date" TEXT /* Date the improvement was made */,
  "improvement_status" TEXT /* Status of the improvement */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_improvements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_improvements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or player visiting the property */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "rent_paid" REAL /* Amount of rent paid during the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "total_rent_collected" REAL /* Total rent collected from the property */,
  "total_improvement_cost" REAL /* Total cost of improvements made to the property */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit from the property */,
  "last_analyzed_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were last updated */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent collected from the property */,
  "average_improvement_cost" REAL /* Average cost of improvements made to the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_analytics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
